PCX (0): Adjusted signature for a broader identification. Updated note in signature, description, reference links and compression type. Extension 'pcc'  was added. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.

PCX (2): Adjusted signature for a broader identification. Updated note in signature, description, reference links and compression type. Extension 'pcc'  was added. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.

PCX (3): Adjusted signature for a broader identification. Updated note in signature, description, reference links and compression type. Extension 'pcc'  was added. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.

PCX (4): Adjusted signature for a broader identification. Updated note in signature, description, reference links and compression type. Extension 'pcc'  was added. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.

PCX (5): Adjusted signature for a broader identification. Updated note in signature, description, reference links and compression type. Extension 'pcc'  was added. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
Waveform Audio (PCMWAVEFORMAT): Updated extension to include .wave. Submitted by Preservica.

Digital Negative Format (DNG) 1.1: Changed maximum offset in signature to the TIFF header and DNGVersion tag near EOF from 4084 to 10000 bytes. Submitted by Digital Repository, Historic Environment Scotland.
GEM Image: Updated description and note field. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
EBCDIC-US: Removal of extension .siard. Submitted by Preservica.
PageMaker PC Document (5.0): Updated description, mime type, updated title to refer to only PC files and extension of pt5 included. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
PageMaker PC Document (6.0): File format description updated, name changed to be specific to PC versions only and extensions added. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
PageMaker PC Document (6.5): File format description updated, name changed to be specific to PC versions only and extensions added. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.

Synchronized Multimedia Integration Language (Generic): Updated name, description and note field. Added new signature and created priority over fmt/101. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
Microsoft Word for MS-DOS Document (v3): Deprecated in favour of another entry. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
Microsoft Word for MS-DOS Document (v4): Version number changed to v1-v4; updated description and notes section; added developer. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
Microsoft Word for MS-DOS Document (v5): Updated description and notes section; added developer. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
Microsoft Word for MS-DOS Document (v5.5): Updated signature, description and notes section; added developer. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 Streaming: Changed format type. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
SID Audio 1: Extension .dxr changed to .sid. Submitted by Preservica.
EndNote Library v1-9: Updated description, version number and added priorities. Changed signature names to include version name. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.

EndNote Import File: Amended internal sigs EndNote Import File No.1 and EndNote Import File No.2: Changed wildcard to {5-50}. Amended bytes within sequences from (44|54) to (41|42|43|44|54). Submitted by The National Library of Australia.
PageMaker PC Document (4.0): Updated description, updated title to refer to only PC files and extension of pt4 included. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
Enhanced Compression Wavelet: Widened signature to account for variations in files found by enquirier. Submitted by The National Library of Australia.
Log ASCII Standard Format: Expanded optional bytes from 0-3 to 0-5 and added optional 'Log ASCII Standard' magic bytes. Submitted by The National Library of Australia.
PostScript 2.0: Added priority over fmt/1616, description, notes and changed format type. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
CATIA Model 4: Updated description and magic bytes. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
CATIA Material Description: Removed stray space character from the start of the name field. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
Adobe Font List: Added description. Submitted by The Swedish Public Employment Service.
Panasonic Raw: Extension changed from upper case RW2 to lower case rw2. Submitted by Preservica.

PKCS #7 Cryptographic Message File: Adjusted signature to include first BOF byte and changed signature name to PKCS #7 Cryptographic Message File from P7M. Updated description and reference links. Added extensions .p7s, .p7b, and MIME types. Submitted by Tatiana Canelhas.
Broadcast WAVE 0 PCM Encoding: Added priority over fmt/142 to prevent double identification with DROID (as is already the case with fmt/141). Submitted by Docuteam AG.
BDOC v2.x: Added priority over fmt/1564 and format type. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
Ableton Live Set: Removed stray space character from the start of the name field. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
Magic Shadow Archiver Disk Image File: Removed stray space character from the start of the MIMEType field. Submitted by Sembiance.
Associated Signature Container Extended (ASiC-E): Container signature added to improve identification from extension only. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
ISDOCX Information System Document (Generic): Updated signature to include BOF ZIP bytes, strengthened the EOF signature. Submitted by KEEP SOLUTIONS.
BibTeX Database File: Strengthened signature by expanding BOF sequence. Submitted by The National Archives and Records Administration.
Adobe InDesign Document 1.0: Removed priority over x-fmt/450. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
Adobe InDesign Document CC 2017: Added .ind and .indt file extensions. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
